query:
SELECT
              te.id AS "id!: String",
              te.canonical_hash AS "canonical_hash!: Vec<u8>"
           FROM trust_edges te
           WHERE te.source_user = ?
             AND te.target_user = ?
             AND te.canonical_hash IS NOT NULL
             AND te.created_at = (
                 SELECT MAX(created_at) FROM trust_edges
                 WHERE source_user = ?
                   AND target_user = ?
                   AND canonical_hash IS NOT NULL
             )
